zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich von Brehna I於1142年2月27日出生時，他的父親Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin44歲，母親Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein39歲。他於1163年與Hedvika Přemyslovna在捷克斯洛伐克莫拉瓦莫拉福斯凱 布e喬維其姆尼斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1182年1月4日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特曼斯費爾德 藍德格布斯泰特享年39歲，埋葬在德國薩辛可福特萊多福可洛斯特海澤。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich von Brehna I于1142年2月27日出生时，他的父亲Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin44岁，母亲Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein39岁。他于1163年与Hedvika Přemyslovna在捷克斯洛伐克莫拉瓦莫拉福斯凱 布e喬維其姆尼斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1182年1月4日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特曼斯費爾德 藍德格布斯泰特享年39岁，埋葬在德国薩辛可福特萊多福可洛斯特海澤。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brehna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): habitational name from a place in Lombardy named Brenna.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farms in southeastern Norway named Brenna, from brenna ‘land cleared for cultivation by burning’.

variants.name: Brena
meanings: Italian (Lombardy, in province of Bergamo): variant of   Brenna  .

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich von Brehna I was born on 27 February 1142, his father, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, was 44 and his mother, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, was 39. He married Hedvika Přemyslovna in 1163, in Jemnice, Moravské Budějovice, Moravia, Czechoslovakia. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 January 1182, in Gerbstedt, Mansfelder Land, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 39, and was buried in Klosterhäuser, Reinsdorf, Querfurt, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich von Brehna I est né le 27 février 1142, son père, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Hedvika Přemyslovna en 1163, à Jemnice, Moravské Budějovice, Morava, Tchécoslovaquie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1182, à Gerbstedt, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Klosterhäuser, Reinsdorf, Querfurt, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.Brehna, Bitterfeld, Saxony, Prussia, Ger: Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich von Brehna I am 27. Februar 1142 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin 44 und seine Mutter Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein 39. Er hat 1163 in Jemnice, Mährisch Budwitz, Mähren, Tschechoslowakei Hedvika Přemyslovna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Januar 1182 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Gerbstedt, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Klosterhäuser, Reinsdorf, Querfurt, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Brehna I è nato il il 27 febbraio 1142, il suo padre, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Hedvika Přemyslovna nel 1163, nel Jemnice, Moravské Budějovice, Morava, Cecoslovacchia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 gennaio 1182, nel Gerbstedt, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Klosterhäuser, Reinsdorf, Querfurt, Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Brehna Iが1142年2月27日に生まれた時，父Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettinは44歳，母Gräfin Luitgard von Ravensteinは39歳であった。1163年にチェコスロバキアモーエイヴァモーアvスクe ブドeジョヴィスジェムニスでHedvika Přemyslovnaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1182年1月4日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトマンスフエルダー ランドジャーブステトで39歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンクエルファートレインスドルフクロステルhaウセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Brehna I(이)가 1142년 2월 27일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1163년 체코 슬로바키아 모라바 모라브스ke 버드e조빅 제나이스에서 Hedvika Přemyslovna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 1월 4일 독일 작센-아할트 맨스펠더 랜드 그르브스테드트에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 크르퍼트 레인즈도르프 클로스터ha세르에 묻혔다.

pt.Brehna, Bitterfeld, Saxony, Prussia, Ger: Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Province of Saxony, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Brehna I nasceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1142, seu pai, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedvika Přemyslovna em 1163, em Jemnice, Moravské Budějovice, Morava, Tchecoslováquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1182, em Gerbstedt, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Klosterhäuser, Reinsdorf, Querfurt, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Brehna, Bitterfeld, Saxony, Prussia, Ger: брэна, крис биттирфелд, провинц оф саксони, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich von Brehna I родился 27 февраля 1142 г., его отцу по имени Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedvika Přemyslovna в 1163 г. в местности джемнаис, моравскe будeджоваис, морава, Чехословакия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 января 1182 г. в местности джирбстедт, мансфелдир ланд, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности клостирaусир, ринсдорф, куирфурт, сачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich von Brehna I nació el 27 de febrero de 1142, su papá, Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Hedvika Přemyslovna en 1163, en Jemnice, Moravské Budějovice, Morava, Checoslovaquia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de enero de 1182, en Gerbstedt, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Klosterhäuser, Reinsdorf, Querfurt, Sachsen, Alemania.
